mapper.sql: id, config_name, config_key, config_value, config_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
mapper.select:
select from sys_config
and config_name like concat('%', #{configName}, '%')
and config_key like concat('%', #{configKey}, '%')
and config_type = #{configType, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}
order by create_time desc, id desc
select from sys_config where config_key = #{configKey} limit 1
